title: semrel plugin args: gitlab
description: Publishes a GitLab Release on the configured instance.

token.description: GitLab API token (Personal Access Token with `api` scope).

base_url.description: Base URL of the GitLab instance.

project_id.description: GitLab project ID. Derived from the git remote when absent.

milestone.description: Milestone template to associate with the release (e.g. `v{{ .Version }}`).
